# 3D AXIS

> A full-stack manufacturing partner taking projects from concept to scalable production. Fiber laser cutting, sheet metal, 3D printing, design and prototyping under one roof.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of 3D AXIS — design, prototype, manufacture, deliver.
- [Start a Project](/start-project): Send us your sketch, CAD file or prototype to get started.
- [FAQ](/faq): Answers about 3D printing, laser cutting, materials, lead times and pricing.
- [Forum](/forum): Workshop updates — new equipment, materials and announcements.

## Capabilities

- [Design & Development](/capabilities/design-development)
- [Fiber Laser Cutting](/capabilities/fiber-laser-cutting)
- [Sheet Metal Forming & Welding](/capabilities/sheet-metal-forming-welding)
- [3D Printing](/capabilities/3d-printing)
- [Design to Prototype](/capabilities/design-to-prototype)
- [Global Manufacturing Network](/capabilities/global-manufacturing-network)
